ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket purchased by the passenger */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of travel (economy, business, etc.) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "family_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the passenger is traveling alone or with family */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group ID for passengers traveling together */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "passport_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the passport */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the passenger has */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Any dietary restrictions the passenger has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any allergies the passenger has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkations ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned to the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare associated with the ticket */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the ticket */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique booking reference for the ticket */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return travel (if applicable) */,
  "travel_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of travel in days */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st Class, 2nd Class, 3rd Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the class is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkations" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port of embarkation */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "emergency_evacuation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger was evacuated in an emergency */,
  "medical_attention" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger required medical attention */,
  "evacuation_method" TEXT /* Method of evacuation (e.g., lifeboat, helicopter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_status_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
